response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong full-stack and web-focused engineer whose career is built almost entirely on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web technologies. His C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project, and C++ does not even appear in his listed skills. There is no evidence of Windows-platform C++ development, no SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no fixed-income, capital markets, or investment-banking systems background. His one fintech role (RIDE Capital) was a Node.js/GraphQL engagement with no indication of financial-product or trading-system depth.
strengths: CI/CD and DevOps familiarity (GitLab CI, Docker, Kubernetes) aligns with desirable pipeline knowledge
Broad multi-language background shows adaptability and a fast learner profile
Some financial-sector exposure via RIDE Capital (German investment platform)
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months professional, not listed in skills) vs. the 5–10 year mandatory requirement
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain knowledge whatsoever
No evidence of Windows-platform development or SQL Server/Oracle usage

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
